renderedFields.description:
Goal
Connect Recent Wins component to the new WebSocket service and render real-time win events.

Scope

  • Connect to WebSocket endpoint
  • Subscribe to win events stream
  • Handle live updates (1 event per second)
  • Replace static/mock data
  • Make game clickable using slug

Functional Requirements

  1. Establish WebSocket connection on component mount
  2. Listen for win events
  3. Render new event every second
  4. Limit displayed items to N (UI limit)
  5. Each item must include:
    • Player nickname
    • Win amount
    • Game name
    • Game slug (click → open game page)

Edge Cases

  • Socket disconnect → auto reconnect
  • Empty stream → component remains stable
  • Duplicate event → do not render twice
  • Missing slug → game should not be clickable

Acceptance Criteria

  • Wins update live every 1 second
  • Clicking win opens correct game page
  • No UI flickering
  • Component works after page refresh

comments.body:
Impact Analysis

Recent Winners Slider

  • Added WebSocket support via RecentWinAdded event
  • New enableLiveUpdates field in Strapi to toggle between WS and polling
  • New betId field added for stable React keys

Recent Winners

  • No WebSocket added, but shares the same hook with Recent Winners Slider
  • Polling behavior unchanged by default (enableLiveUpdates defaults to false)

Recent Bets Slider

  • enableLiveUpdates field added in Strapi, no logic changes

Risks

  • No regressions — enableLiveUpdates: false by default preserves existing polling
  • WebSocket connection is only established when explicitly enabled

Can be tested here: https://minebit-casino.qa.sofon.one
Game: https://minebit-casino.qa.sofon.one/game/tradesmarter-options-27814

issuetype.description: A task that needs to be done.
issuetype.name: Task

renderedFields.description:
Summary:

Implement front-end logic for unlinking social providers with mandatory 2FA confirmation and backend validation handling.

Description:

Implement functionality to:

  • Call BE endpoint for unlinking social provider.
  • Trigger mandatory 2FA flow before sending final unlink request.
  • Send unlink request only after successful 2FA verification.
  • Handle BE validation response:
    • Allow unlink if at least one valid login method remains.
    • Block unlink if no login methods remain or partner rules restrict it.
  • Update user state only after successful response.

Acceptance Criteria:

  • Unlink request sent only after successful 2FA.
  • FE correctly processes BE validation errors.
  • Unlink blocked if BE returns restriction.
  • User state updated only after successful unlink.
  • No unlink possible without 2FA confirmation.

renderedFields.description:
Description

Implement frontend logic to display informational and error messages related to social login and account access reset.

Requirements:

  1. Login errors:
    • When logging in via email + password after social login reset:
      • If no password exists but email is linked via social login → show error:
        #*“This login method is inactive. Please use another one.”
      • If password exists and email is linked via social login → allow login.
    • Backend will provide the necessary flags / codes; frontend displays notifications accordingly.
  2. First social login / Google linking:
    • During the first login / Google social linking, a flag is returned indicating that user data has been reset.
    • Show informational message:
      #“Your account access method has been changed — personal data has been cleared for security reasons. Please re-enter it if necessary.”
  3. Add all error and info messages to Strapi.
  4. Add texts for all available locales.

Acceptance Criteria

  1. When logging in via email + password:
    • If no password exists but social login is linked → display error “This login method is inactive. Please use another one.”
    • If password exists and social login is linked → login is allowed.
  2. During first social login / Google linking, display informational message:
    “Your account access method has been changed — personal data has been cleared for security reasons. Please re-enter it if necessary.”
  3. All messages are stored in Strapi and properly localized for all available languages.
  4. Notifications are correctly displayed based on backend flags / codes.

renderedFields.description:
Task:
1. Implement frontend logic to send the current user auth token when initiating social account linking and unlinking.

  1. Add google to the UI in Client Profile.

Description:
When the user clicks “Link Google” in their profile, frontend must:

  • Retrieve the current auth token (session token used by the app).
  • Send this token to the backend endpoint that initiates social linking.
  • Backend will embed this token into the OAuth request to the external provider.
  • Ensure correct handling for Google linking flows.

Acceptance Criteria:

  • Frontend sends current auth token when initiating linking.
  • Backend receives token correctly and includes it into OAuth .
  • Linking flow works end-to-end for Google.
  • Error handling implemented (missing token, invalid token, etc.).
